story.title: Terence Tao's ChatGPT conversation about the Jacobian Conjecture counterexample

draft:
I just read about Terence Tao's conversation with ChatGPT on the Jacobian Conjecture counterexample. 
Tao's exchange with ChatGPT reveals the AI's limitations in advanced math. 
Key points include ChatGPT's struggle with abstract concepts and its reliance on patterns. 
Can AI systems like ChatGPT ever truly grasp complex mathematical ideas?
#AI #Mathematics #ChatGPT
